description: Select all occurrences of current selection. Perfect for renaming variables or editing multiple instances at once without using find and replace!
Insert multiple cursors. Edit multiple lines simultaneously, saving you tons of time when modifying repetitive code.
Quick Open. Navigate to any file in your project instantly just by typing part of its name.
Reopen closed tab. A lifesaver when you accidentally close that StackOverflow tab you desperately needed.
Open clipboard history. See and paste from a list of items you've copied recently, not just the last one.
Capture a selected portion of the screen. Great for quick bug reporting or sharing code snippets.
Toggle line comment. Quickly comment or uncomment a single line or a block of code.
